title: 2026-06-03 Shino Helsinki Cloudberry Amber
summary: Four-image Shino character day album in Helsinki, using cloudberry amber across Oodi maker notes, Arabia ceramics glaze testing, Kallio theater wrong turn, and Kalasatama climbing focus.
summaryJa: ヘルシンキのアルバム。色の軸はクラウドベリーアンバー。構成は仕事、ミュージアム、イベント会場、studio-sports。

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, at Helsinki Central Library Oodi on 2026-06-03, studying a fish and sound notebook beside maker tools and a folded city map, wearing an ivory shirt, mist-blue utility apron, light denim trousers, black loafers, and a cloudberry-amber hair clip
images.title: 01 Oodi maker library cloudberry notebook

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, in an Arabia district ceramics studio in Helsinki, comparing a small glaze test tile beside ceramic samples, wearing a pale oatmeal knit, natural-canvas vest, sage trousers, brown loafers, and a cloudberry-amber belt with fish charm
images.title: 02 Arabia ceramics glaze test
images.locationDetail: Arabia district ceramics studio in Helsinki

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, at a Kallio black-box theater entrance after a wrong turn, holding a folded ticket and garment bag, wearing a pale lavender blouse, ivory pleated skirt, light stone trench, pale boots, and cloudberry-amber scarf detail
images.title: 03 Kallio theater wrong turn trench

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, in a Kalasatama indoor climbing gym, cautiously trying a low bouldering hold with focused balance, wearing a pale aqua performance tee, oatmeal tied overshirt, muted sage wrap skort over charcoal bike shorts, cream socks, climbing shoes, and a cloudberry-amber chalk bag
images.title: 04 Kalasatama climbing amber chalkbag
